mapper.select: SELECT e.equipment_id AS equipmentId, e.equipment_process_id AS equipmentProcessId, e.environment_standard_id AS environmentStandardId, e.equipment_code AS equipmentCode, e.equipment_name AS equipmentName, e.equipment_status AS equipmentStatus, e.equipment_grade AS equipmentGrade, e.equipment_install_date AS equipmentInstallDate, e.equipment_description AS equipmentDescription, ep.equipment_process_name AS equipmentProcessName, fl.factory_line_name AS factoryLineName, es.environment_code AS environmentCode, es.environment_name AS environmentName FROM equipment e INNER JOIN equipment_process ep ON e.equipment_process_id = ep.equipment_process_id INNER JOIN factory_line fl ON ep.factory_line_id = fl.factory_line_id INNER JOIN environment_standard es ON e.environment_standard_id = es.environment_standard_id WHERE e.equipment_id = #{equipmentId}
SELECT equipment_id FROM equipment WHERE equipment_code = #{equipmentCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT equipment_aging_param_id FROM equipment_aging_param WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} LIMIT 1
SELECT equipment_baseline_id FROM equipment_baseline WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} LIMIT 1

SELECT equipment_aging_param_id AS equipmentAgingParamId, equipment_id AS equipmentId, equipment_eta_age AS equipmentEtaAge, equipment_warranty_month AS equipmentWarrantyMonth, equipment_design_life_months AS equipmentDesignLifeMonths, equipment_wear_coefficient AS equipmentWearCoefficient, equipment_age_months AS equipmentAgeMonths, equipment_age_calculated_at AS equipmentAgeCalculatedAt FROM equipment_aging_param WHERE equipment_aging_param_id = #{equipmentAgingParamId}

SELECT equipment_baseline_id AS equipmentBaselineId, equipment_id AS equipmentId, equipment_aging_param_id AS equipmentAgingParamId, equipment_standard_performance_rate AS equipmentStandardPerformanceRate, equipment_baseline_error_rate AS equipmentBaselineErrorRate, equipment_eta_maint AS equipmentEtaMaint, equipment_idx AS equipmentIdx, equipment_baseline_calculated_at AS equipmentBaselineCalculatedAt FROM equipment_baseline WHERE equipment_baseline_id = #{equipmentBaselineId}
